name: Auth0 Active Accounts Missing Email
description: Detects active auth0 accounts missing an email address for identity matching and offboarding controls.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.name AS account_name FROM auth0_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.blocked, false) = false AND COALESCE(TRIM(u.email), '') = ''
remediation: Populate a valid corporate email on the account or disable the account until ownership can be verified.
